'''Danalis''' was a homeless [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|girl]] who was picked up by [[Garris Shrike]].

==Biography==
Danalis was one of many street children Shrike used to beg and steal for him as he traveled from world to world in the [[Liberator (Liberator-class)|''Trader's Luck'']] on smuggling runs. Her face had been gnawed by [[Vrelt/Legends|vrelts]], leaving her with no ears or nose and pitiable. Shrike exploited her disfigurement by using her as a beggar. He originally lured Danalis into his service by promising that he would have her face repaired when she earned enough. She trained with the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[F8GN]]. By the [[Time/Legends|time]] she was fourteen [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old, Danalis realized Shrike would never live up to this promise and committed [[Death/Legends|suicide]] by cycling an [[Airlock/Legends|airlock]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Paradise Snare]]'' {{Flash}}
